title: cyathea pungens
intro: Cyathea pungens, also known as the needle fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, preventing infection, and promoting wound healing. Cyathea pungens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
